creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-06-04 21:41:41 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    games                Makefile 
  Added files:
    games/linux-defcon   Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-message 
                         pkg-plist 
    games/linux-defcon/files defcon.in 
  Log:
  Defcon is announced as "The World's first Genocide 'em up". It is a
  global thermonuclear war simulation inspired by movies like WarGames
  and features multiplayer support, different game modes and support for
  own game mods.
  
  WWW: http://www.introversion.co.uk/defcon/
  
  PR:             ports/112939
  Submitted by:   Marcus von Appen <mva at sysfault.org
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1117    +1 -0      ports/games/Makefile
  1.1       +60 -0     ports/games/linux-defcon/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/games/linux-defcon/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/games/linux-defcon/files/defcon.in (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/games/linux-defcon/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +14 -0     ports/games/linux-defcon/pkg-message (new)
  1.1       +9 -0      ports/games/linux-defcon/pkg-plist (new)
